project_type: Node.js Express CRM app with Socket.IO for real-time updates
build_system: npm - no build step, just npm install + node server.js
test_framework: None - no test files exist in the project
test_command: node -c server.js && node -c public/tl/index.html 2>/dev/null || echo 'HTML not JS-checkable'
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to confirm dependencies resolve. 2. Run node -e "require('./server')" with a timeout to confirm server.js loads without crash. 3. Verify tl/index.html is valid HTML with all required sections present.
environment_constraints: No browser available for manual testing. Validate by checking file structure, syntax, and completeness of features.
contribution_requirements: Single HTML files with embedded CSS and JS. No frameworks. Uses Socket.IO for real-time, fetch API for REST calls.
key_patterns: Each panel (admin, agent, tl) is a single self-contained HTML file with embedded <style> and <script> blocks. Socket.IO client loaded from /socket.io/socket.io.js. REST API calls use fetch(). Real-time updates via socket events (stats-update, show-number, no-numbers, break-started, break-ended, etc.). Agent identification via 'emp_' + employeeId pattern. TL has role=tl in allowedEids. Admin dark theme uses Space Grotesk font, agent light theme uses DM Sans.
directory_structure: public/admin/index.html - Admin panel (dark theme, full access), public/agent/index.html - Agent dialer (light theme), public/tl/index.html - TL panel (dual mode: agent mode + TL monitoring mode), server.js - Express+Socket.IO backend, data/state.json - persistent state
